featureName: BUG-022-003: Uneven 429 / Retry-After handling across connectors (code-review H-2)

completedPhaseClaims.evidence: Implementation complete. NEW: internal/connector/retry.go, internal/metrics/connector_rate_limit.go, internal/connector/helpers_test.go, internal/connector/alerts/retry_test.go, internal/connector/markets/retry_test.go. MODIFIED: internal/connector/helpers.go (OAuthAPIGet through DoWithRetry); internal/connector/alerts/alerts.go (Connector.retryOpts + 7 fetch call sites migrated); internal/connector/markets/markets.go (Connector.retryOpts + 4 fetch call sites migrated, redactedHTTPError preserves unwrap chain); alerts_test.go + markets_test.go test helpers shortened retry opts; 3 legacy markets 429 tests reconciled to errors.Is(connector.ErrRateLimitExhausted). RED captured by reverting 3 call sites: TestAlertsSources_HonorRetryAfter/USGS + TestOAuthAPIGet_HonorsRetryAfter + TestFetchFinnhubQuote_HonorsRetryAfter all FAIL. GREEN: go test ./internal/connector/ ./internal/connector/alerts/ ./internal/connector/markets/ -race -count=1 OK; helper subset PASS; ./smackerel.sh test unit --go run end-to-end with one pre-existing unrelated failure (TestSST_NoHardcodedOllamaValues on ml/app/processor.py:104 confirmed pre-existing on HEAD c844addc via git stash).

executionHistory.evidence: Bug filed from code-review finding H-2 (P1). 429/Retry-After handling uneven across Smackerel HTTP connectors: discord/guesthost (client.go L214)/hospitable (client.go L245)/weather honor Retry-After correctly via dedicated 429 case + bounded backoff; internal/connector/alerts/alerts.go has 7 sites (USGS L472, NWS L843, tsunami L1051, volcanoes L1174, inciweb L1316, AirNow L1434, GDACS L1581) using blanket `if resp.StatusCode != http.StatusOK { return err }`; internal/connector/helpers.go::OAuthAPIGet L54-57 treats 429 as opaque non-200; markets has its own client-side budget but no Retry-After parsing (markets_test.go L561). Verified L54-57 of helpers.go and L195-247 of guesthost/client.go in-tree before filing. Impact: brownouts escalate to hard bans (AirNow, GDACS especially); supervisor health signal noisy.

8-artifact bug folder created at specs/022-operational-resilience/bugs/BUG-022-003-connector-429-retry-after-handling/: bug.md, spec.md, design.md (root cause + fix approach + regression test design), scopes.md (1 scope, 9 Gherkin scenarios SCN-422-003-A..I paired 1:1 with DoD items, Test Plan with 11 entries), report.md (initialized with pending evidence sections), uservalidation.md (3 checked items), scenario-manifest.json (9 scenarios, all status=pending, regressionProtected=true, tdd.mode=required), state.json. Change boundary documented as ~5–6 files: internal/connector/helpers.go + internal/connector/alerts/alerts.go + internal/connector/markets/* + helpers_test.go + alerts_test.go + markets_test.go. No discord/guesthost/hospitable/weather code paths touched.

executionHistory.expansionReason: parent-expand simplify phase because nested runtime lacks runSubagent capability for bubbles.simplify dispatch during bugfix-fastlane convergence.
executionHistory.evidence: No simplification opportunity surfaced. DoWithRetry is minimum-viable for the 429+Retry-After+bounded-backoff contract; reusing the existing Backoff struct avoids parallel state machines. RetryOptions is a struct rather than positional args because callers need to override only a subset of fields (label always, attempts/delays only in tests).

executionHistory.expansionReason: parent-expand stabilize phase because nested runtime lacks runSubagent capability for bubbles.stabilize dispatch during bugfix-fastlane convergence.
executionHistory.evidence: All 12 new tests deterministic. httptest servers are per-test; atomic.AddInt32 used for hit counters under -race; HTTP-date sub-second clock alignment relaxed to [1s, 4s] window per actual http.TimeFormat truncation semantics; ctx cancel test allows 500ms slack for goroutine scheduling. Full -race suite green for connector, alerts, markets packages.

executionHistory.evidence: A04 Insecure Design REDUCED — bounded retry budget prevents accidental DoS amplification of upstream providers under throttle. A09 Security Logging STRENGTHENED — every 429 event is now metric-observable via smackerel_connector_429_total{connector,outcome}. AirNow API-key redaction preserved through redactedHTTPError unwrap chain (test fixture TestFetchFinnhubForex_HTTPError still validates redaction path indirectly). No new credentials handled; no new attack surface introduced.
